name: session-pins
description: Pin editable instructions and live files into every prompt of a Copilot CLI session. Adds a /pin command and agent-callable pin tools.
postInstallMessage:
session-pins installed. One-time activation is needed, because Copilot CLI does not yet auto-load a plugin's extension. Run this command and approve when asked:

  /session-pins:install

Then relaunch Copilot with  copilot --experimental  (extensions only load in experimental mode). Then use /pin, or just ask Copilot to pin an instruction or file. Running /session-pins:install again later is safe — it just reports status and usage.
